title: elaphoglossum feei
intro: Elaphoglossum feei, also known as the Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Brazilian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum feei include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Elaphoglossum feei is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
